name: Mina Fast-Start
perspective: New player who likes management games but skips manuals.
play_style: Follows the most prominent recommended button and checks whether the next goal is obvious.

name: Joon Card-Cause
role: first launch and card impact reviewer
perspective: Card game player checking whether chosen cards visibly affect launch results.
play_style: Inspects result ribbons and compares card cause, score change, and launch impact.

name: Sora Build-Variety
perspective: Roguelite player looking for a meaningful build decision after first launch.
play_style: Chooses synergy-heavy rewards and checks confirmation feedback.

name: Daehyun Systems
perspective: Management sim player who wants the research-product loop to feel strategic.
play_style: Follows research recommendations and checks whether locked products explain their requirements.

name: Yuri Completion
perspective: Core player checking whether the run feels complete and replayable.
play_style: Runs through second product payoff and judges the final debrief hierarchy.
